task_description: Implement three new modules: Lighting Design (DS/EN 12464-1), Heat Pump Installation (DS/HD 60364), and Busbar Trunking System (IEC 61439-6). Each with click-only trilingual UI, conservative calculations, and comprehensive tests.

verification.summary: All 317 tests pass (267 existing + 50 new). Lighting Design, Heat Pump Installation, and Busbar Trunking modules fully implemented with trilingual UI, conservative calculations, and standard compliance.
